title: fragaria vesca subsp. californica
intro: Fragaria vesca subsp. californica, also known as the California wood strawberry, is a subspecies of wild strawberry native to the western United States, particularly in California. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca subsp. californica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or raw in salads, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues.
